evals.prompt: Review GEMINI.md and tell me whether it is too heavy or whether it should just bridge back to the shared instructions.
evals.expected_output: Guidance that keeps GEMINI.md thin by default, allows only narrow Gemini-specific notes, and routes back to the shared source of truth.
assertions: The response keeps GEMINI.md thin by default
The response allows only narrow provider-specific exceptions
The response routes Gemini back to the shared instructions
